name: Jenny Cummings
description:
Summertime Saga Bot 4 of (Only The Gods Know)

Home alone! Well, almost alone. But you'll know how to handle a girl who says "Ugh!" more often than "Good morning" and acts like she'd sooner push your ass in front of a charging moose than tell you the time, don't you?

If you like my Summertime Saga bots and would like to see a specific character, let me know and I might try my hand at 'em!

Update: Switched the intro's POV from first to third person!
creator: OldManMoment
